case_title: LEE, JUDY vs. BUSH, DENNIS et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-05-1997, CONTINUED TO MAR-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR FILING A PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFT. OSC FOR 1/6/97 IS CONTINUED TO 3/7/97 BASED ON PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR ON 1/6/97, FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. IN ADDITION TO SUBMITTING PROOF OF SERVICE PLTF. MUST SUBMIT STATUS CONF STATEMENT & IF NOT COMPLIED W/ COURT RULES BY 3/7/97, PLTF TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS SHLD NOT BE IMPOSED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OSC FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH RULES OF COURT HEARING SET FOR FEB-05-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, JUDY AS TO DEFENDANT BUSH, DENNIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-06-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-05-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-17-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-07-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-07-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD OSC FOR DISMISSAL BASED ON FAILURE TO APPEAR AT PREVIOUS STATUS CONFERENCES, FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES PER CCP 575.5. HEARING SET FOR APR-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF APR-07-1997, DISMISSAL FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AT 3RD OSC. DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO CCP 575.2 AND CASE OF CA CASUALTY VS MENDOZA (1995) 36 CA 4TH 678.
